# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: stack.jinja

resources:
- name: app-stack
  type: stack.jinja
  properties:
    project: {{ env["project"] }}
    region: us-central1
    zone: us-central1-a

    networkName: app-vpc
    subnetName: app-subnet
    subnetCidr: 10.10.0.0/24

    bucketName: {{ env["project"] }}-app-bucket

    sql:
      name: app-sql
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
      tier: db-custom-1-3840
      diskSizeGb: 20
      diskType: PD_SSD
      backupEnabled: true
      availabilityType: ZONAL
      databaseName: appdb
      userName: appuser

    instanceGroup:
      name: app-mig
      machineType: e2-medium
      imageProject: debian-cloud
      imageFamily: debian-12
      targetSize: 2
      servicePort: 8080
      startupScript: |
        #!/bin/bash
        set -e
        apt-get update
        apt-get install -y nginx
        cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<'EOF'
        <html><body><h1>App Stack OK</h1></body></html>
        EOF
        rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default || true
        cat >/etc/nginx/conf.d/app.conf <<'EOF'
        server {
          listen 8080 default_server;
          server_name _;
          root /var/www/html;
          location / { try_files $uri $uri/ =404; }
        }
        EOF
        systemctl restart nginx

    loadBalancer:
      name: app-lb

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.app-stack.bucketName)
- name: sqlConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-stack.sqlConnectionName)
- name: lbIpAddress
  value: $(ref.app-stack.lbIpAddress)
- name: instanceGroup
  value: $(ref.app-stack.instanceGroup)

---
{% set project = properties.get('project', env['project']) %}
{% set region = properties.get('region', 'us-central1') %}
{% set zone = properties.get('zone', region ~ '-a') %}

{% set networkName = properties.get('networkName', 'app-vpc') %}
{% set subnetName = properties.get('subnetName', 'app-subnet') %}
{% set subnetCidr = properties.get('subnetCidr', '10.10.0.0/24') %}

{% set bucketName = properties.get('bucketName', project ~ '-app-bucket') %}

{% set sql = properties.get('sql', {}) %}
{% set sqlName = sql.get('name', 'app-sql') %}
{% set sqlDatabaseVersion = sql.get('databaseVersion', 'MYSQL_8_0') %}
{% set sqlTier = sql.get('tier', 'db-custom-1-3840') %}
{% set sqlDiskSizeGb = sql.get('diskSizeGb', 20) %}
{% set sqlDiskType = sql.get('diskType', 'PD_SSD') %}
{% set sqlBackupEnabled = sql.get('backupEnabled', true) %}
{% set sqlAvailabilityType = sql.get('availabilityType', 'ZONAL') %}
{% set sqlDatabaseName = sql.get('databaseName', 'appdb') %}
{% set sqlUserName = sql.get('userName', 'appuser') %}

{% set instanceGroup = properties.get('instanceGroup', {}) %}
{% set migName = instanceGroup.get('name', 'app-mig') %}
{% set machineType = instanceGroup.get('machineType', 'e2-medium') %}
{% set imageProject = instanceGroup.get('imageProject', 'debian-cloud') %}
{% set imageFamily = instanceGroup.get('imageFamily', 'debian-12') %}
{% set targetSize = instanceGroup.get('targetSize', 2) %}
{% set servicePort = instanceGroup.get('servicePort', 8080) %}
{% set startupScript = instanceGroup.get('startupScript', '#!/bin/bash\necho hello') %}

{% set loadBalancer = properties.get('loadBalancer', {}) %}
{% set lbName = loadBalancer.get('name', 'app-lb') %}

resources:
- name: {{ networkName }}
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: {{ subnetName }}
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: {{ region }}
    network: $(ref.{{ networkName }}.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: {{ subnetCidr }}
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true

- name: app-router
  type: compute.v1.router
  properties:
    region: {{ region }}
    network: $(ref.{{ networkName }}.selfLink)
    bgp:
      asn: 64514

- name: app-nat
  type: compute.v1.routerNat
  properties:
    region: {{ region }}
    router: $(ref.app-router.name)
    natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
    sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: ALL_SUBNETWORKS_ALL_IP_RANGES
    enableEndpointIndependentMapping: true
    logConfig:
      enable: false

- name: app-allow-healthcheck
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.{{ networkName }}.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "{{ servicePort }}"
    targetTags:
    - app-server

- name: app-allow-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.{{ networkName }}.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"
    targetTags:
    - app-server

- name: app-allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.{{ networkName }}.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - {{ subnetCidr }}
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
    - IPProtocol: udp
    - IPProtocol: icmp

- name: {{ bucketName }}
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ bucketName }}
    location: {{ region }}
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    publicAccessPrevention: enforced

- name: {{ sqlName }}
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    name: {{ sqlName }}
    region: {{ region }}
    databaseVersion: {{ sqlDatabaseVersion }}
    settings:
      tier: {{ sqlTier }}
      availabilityType: {{ sqlAvailabilityType }}
      dataDiskType: {{ sqlDiskType }}
      dataDiskSizeGb: {{ sqlDiskSizeGb }}
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: {{ sqlBackupEnabled }}
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.{{ networkName }}.selfLink)

- name: {{ sqlName }}-db
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases
  properties:
    name: {{ sqlDatabaseName }}
    instance: $(ref.{{ sqlName }}.name)
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - {{ sqlName }}

- name: {{ sqlName }}-user
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    name: {{ sqlUserName }}
    instance: $(ref.{{ sqlName }}.name)
    host: "%"
    password: "{{ env['deployment'] }}-ChangeMe-StrongPassword123!"
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - {{ sqlName }}

- name: app-sa
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-sa
    displayName: App VM Service Account

- name: app-sa-storage-objectadmin
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ project }}
    role: roles/storage.objectAdmin
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-sa.email)

- name: app-healthcheck
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: {{ servicePort }}
    requestPath: /
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    unhealthyThreshold: 2
    healthyThreshold: 2

- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: {{ machineType }}
      tags:
        items:
        - app-server
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: $(ref.app-sa.email)
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      disks:
      - boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/{{ imageProject }}/global/images/family/{{ imageFamily }}
          diskSizeGb: 20
          diskType: pd-balanced
      networkInterfaces:
      - subnetwork: $(ref.{{ subnetName }}.selfLink)
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
{{ startupScript | indent(12, true) }}

- name: {{ migName }}
  type: compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager
  properties:
    region: {{ region }}
    baseInstanceName: app
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: {{ targetSize }}
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: {{ servicePort }}

- name: app-autoscaler
  type: compute.v1.regionAutoscaler
  properties:
    region: {{ region }}
    target: $(ref.{{ migName }}.selfLink)
    autoscalingPolicy:
      minNumReplicas: {{ targetSize }}
      maxNumReplicas: {{ targetSize * 3 if targetSize * 3 > targetSize else targetSize }}
      cpuUtilization:
        utilizationTarget: 0.6
      coolDownPeriodSec: 90

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-healthcheck.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.{{ migName }}.instanceGroup)
      balancingMode: UTILIZATION
      maxUtilization: 0.8
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL_MANAGED

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-lb-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    name: {{ lbName }}-ip

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    name: {{ lbName }}-fr
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "80"
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL_MANAGED

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: {{ bucketName }}
- name: sqlConnectionName
  value: $(ref.{{ sqlName }}.connectionName)
- name: lbIpAddress
  value: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
- name: instanceGroup
  value: $(ref.{{ migName }}.instanceGroup)
